title: Coordinated Fire Doctrine
summary: Synchronizing fire with allied ships for maximum damage concentration.
details: Multiple ships focusing fire on one target destroy it faster than distributed fire. Coordinate with allies to designate primary target. Time salvos to hit simultaneously for shield/armor overwhelm. When captain calls target, all gunners engage that target unless assigned defensive duties. Call out when switching targets so allies can follow or maintain fire.
annotations: Coordinated fire is the cornerstone of fleet combat.
Overkill is better than underkill - destroyed enemies can't shoot back.
